grid: square 32x32, 32px=1m, camera 3/4 from S @40deg (ADR-0006 boat bake match)
water: NONE baked. Engine shader owns water/foam/waterline (ADR 0010/0012/0023). Tiles are pure land; the tide sweeps over them.

ground.cols: 3 adjacent world tiles (noise is world-locked; bake any gx,gy via rig)

fringe.use: transparent overlay; stamp over the neighbour material tile

cliff.stack: cap + mid*N + toe, ~1.3m/band at the 40deg camera
